---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for DoubtDesk
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## 🎯 Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature address? Who benefits from it?

## 📋 Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this working.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Have you thought about other ways to solve this?

## 📸 Mockups / References
If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or links to similar features in other apps.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context or details about the feature request.
